---
title: "Decision Tree Model"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: yes
    toc_float: 
      collapsed: TRUE
---

<div style="padding: 15px; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-left: 5px solid #ccc;" >
[Back to MainReportHW4](MainReportHW4.html#dtmodel)
</div>


# import data

```{r}
train <- readRDS("hoteldata_og.rds")

str(train)
```

# model 

```{r, cache=TRUE}
library(randomForest)

dtmodel <- randomForest(is_canceled ~., data = train)

plot(dtmodel)

saveRDS(dtmodel, file = "decisiontree.rds")
```

<div style="padding: 15px; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-left: 5px solid #ccc;" >
[Back to MainReportHW4](MainReportHW4.html#dtmodel)
</div>
